purpose: Verify that the reviewer critiques other agents through a security lens.

cases.name: reviews performance advice for secret leakage
cases.input: A performance suggestion expands child process environment forwarding.

cases.name: does not confirm cross-scope leakage when global isolation exists
cases.input: A performance finding says a query filters only by customerId, but source context shows global ORM filters, scoped repositories, or row-level security and no bypass.

cases.name: flags confirmed cross-scope bypass
cases.input: A query uses raw SQL filtering only by customerId and bypasses the scoped repository or global filters.
